name: Home
title: Home
metaDescription: Welcome to Elliot Dickerson's experimental Vue.js website featuring projects, games, and more.
metaKeywords: Vue.js, web development, software engineer, projects, games
body: Welcome to my experimental Vue.js playground! This site is where I test new ideas, experiment with features, and build small projects.
I recently joined RM as a Software Engineer and am excited to contribute to the team's success. This role provides a great platform for professional growth.

name: About
title: About Me
metaDescription: Learn about Elliot Dickerson - BSc (Hons) graduate with 14 years of PHP and JavaScript development experience.
metaKeywords: software engineer, PHP, Laravel, Symfony, VueJS, React, experience
body: I'm a BSc (Hons) graduate who has been working with computers professionally for most of my career.

With 14 years of experience in software and web development, I've primarily focused on PHP while also working extensively with JavaScript. I'm proficient with version control systems like Git and have strong MySQL database management skills.

Throughout my career, I've gained experience with multiple frameworks and libraries, notably:
  • Laravel and Symfony for PHP development
  • React, SolidJS and VueJS for building dynamic user interfaces
I am currently working at RM as a Software Engineer, where I'm excited to tackle new challenges and contribute to innovative projects.

name: Interests
title: My Interests
metaDescription: Discover Elliot's interests in coding, music, and creative projects including original guitar compositions.
metaKeywords: coding, music, guitar, YouTube, hobbies, creative projects
body: When I'm not coding professionally, I love working on personal coding projects. It's a great way to explore new technologies and experiment with innovative concepts.
Music is another big passion of mine. I play several instruments, with guitar being my main focus. I enjoy composing original music and have shared some pieces on my YouTube channel.
I'm also currently exploring new technologies like Three.js for 3D graphics and experimenting with creative web experiences. The cyberpunk city on this site is one such experiment!

name: Hidden
title: Hidden
metaDescription: Secret page with links to fun projects and games built with Vue.js.
body: Welcome to the hidden page! This area isn't linked in the main navigation, but it's here for those curious enough to find it.
Here are some fun projects and games I've built:

• Alcohol Checker - Calculate when you'll be sober enough to drive
  • Noughts and Crosses - Classic tic-tac-toe against a bot
  • Ask Me - Chat with an automated assistant about my background
